Widget Embed Demo

This page simulates a third-party website. The "Instant Quote" button in the bottom-right corner is loaded via the embed script.

How to embed on your website

Add this single line before the closing </body> tag:

<script src="https://your-widget-domain.com/api/embed" async></script>

That's it. The script handles everything: trigger button, panel loading, nudge tooltip, and mobile responsiveness.

Performance

LCP impact: Minimal. The embed script is loaded with async so it never blocks page rendering. The trigger button is injected into native DOM (not an iframe), so it renders instantly. The widget panel iframe is only created on first click (lazy loaded).

SEO impact: None. The widget is a UI overlay — it doesn't interfere with page content, headings, or structured data. The trigger button uses semantic HTML with proper ARIA labels.

What the embed loads

1. Trigger button — 0.5KB of inline CSS + native DOM button (instant render)

2. Nudge tooltip — shows after 8 seconds, once per session

3. Widget panel — loaded in iframe only when user clicks (lazy, ~50KB)
